news.title:
Vodafone Idea fell 4% post investor meeting plans; Jindal Saw dropped 3.5% after prior gains.
YES Bank declined 3% amid asset quality concerns; geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices weigh on markets.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea fell 4% post investor meeting plans; Jindal Saw dropped 3.5% after prior gains.
YES Bank declined 3% amid asset quality concerns; geopolitical tensions and rising crude prices weigh on markets.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea's AGR dues to reduce by 31%, cutting liabilities by ₹27,000Cr.
Panel reassessment leads to significant reduction in liabilities for Vodafone Idea.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea's AGR dues to reduce by 31%, cutting liabilities by ₹27,000Cr.

news.title:
Jio, Airtel, Vodafone Idea, BSNL oppose ISPs offering dedicated connectivity, citing competition concerns.
Telcos argue regulatory parity would be undermined by allowing ISPs to provide high-speed internet to enterprises.
news.summary:
Jio, Airtel, Vodafone Idea, BSNL oppose ISPs offering dedicated connectivity, citing competition concerns.
Telcos argue regulatory parity would be undermined by allowing ISPs to provide high-speed internet to enterprises.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea CFO links telecom growth to tech economy at ETCFO Summit.
Finance leaders stress CFOs' role amid geopolitical changes and supply chain shifts.

news.title: DoT field offices are reassessing Vodafone Idea's AGR dues, as per sources.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea shares rose 3.5% as DoT may slash its licence fee liabilities by 60–65%.
JPMorgan downgraded Vodafone Idea to 'Underweight', citing funding challenges and optimistic growth projections.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea shares rose 3.5% as DoT may slash its licence fee liabilities by 60–65%.
JPMorgan downgraded Vodafone Idea to 'Underweight', citing funding challenges and optimistic growth projections.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea's license fee reassessment is completed, with a possible 60-65% reduction.
Spectrum usage charge review is anticipated by March 31.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea's license fee reassessment is completed, with a possible 60-65% reduction.
Spectrum usage charge review is anticipated by March 31.

news.title: Vi anticipates a 60-65% reduction in license fees, signaling cost savings.
news.summary: Vi anticipates a 60-65% reduction in license fees, signaling cost savings.

news.title:
Nifty 50 rebounded by 200 points, up 0.8%, after 3-session selloff driven by US-Iran war and crude price surge.
Vodafone Idea, Suzlon Energy, Tata Silver ETF, and Tata Gold ETF among top traded stocks; ETFs reflect commodity hedge interest.
news.summary:
Nifty 50 rebounded by 200 points, up 0.8%, after 3-session selloff driven by US-Iran war and crude price surge.
Vodafone Idea, Suzlon Energy, Tata Silver ETF, and Tata Gold ETF among top traded stocks; ETFs reflect commodity hedge interest.

news.title:
Vodafone Idea's credit rating upgraded by ICRA to BBB with Positive outlook.
Revision applies to Long Term Fund Based Term Loans; earlier outlook was Stable.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea's credit rating upgraded by ICRA to BBB with Positive outlook.
Revision applies to Long Term Fund Based Term Loans; earlier outlook was Stable.

news.title:
Telcos' gross revenue surged to ₹1.02 lakh crore in Q3FY26, says TRAI.
AGR rose by 8.1% to ₹84,270 crore during the December 2025 quarter.
news.summary:
Telcos' gross revenue surged to ₹1.02 lakh crore in Q3FY26, says TRAI.
AGR rose by 8.1% to ₹84,270 crore during the December 2025 quarter.

news.title:
Ericsson secures deals to modernize Vodafone Idea's postpaid billing and expand 4G, 5G networks.
Ericsson will deploy its Charging solution for Vi to enhance postpaid subscriber segment and offerings.
news.summary:

news.title:
Vodafone Idea fined Rs. 6.03 lakhs for UCC regulation breach.
Violation pertains to March 2024 quarter; company reviewing next steps.
news.summary:
Vodafone Idea fined Rs. 6.03 lakhs for UCC regulation breach.

news.title:
Govt won't raise stake in Vodafone Idea beyond 49%, per Minister Scindia.
Vodafone Idea's AGR dues frozen at ₹87,695Cr, phased payments FY32-FY41.
news.summary:
Govt won't raise stake in Vodafone Idea beyond 49%, per Minister Scindia.

news.title:
Filatex Fashions, Vodafone Idea, and IDFC First Bank were among the most traded NSE stocks amid market volatility and profit booking.
Filatex surged nearly 14%, IDFC First Bank rose 1%, while Vodafone Idea fell 1%, reflecting mixed investor sentiment.
news.summary:
Filatex Fashions, Vodafone Idea, and IDFC First Bank were among the most traded NSE stocks amid market volatility and profit booking.
Filatex surged nearly 14%, IDFC First Bank rose 1%, while Vodafone Idea fell 1%, reflecting mixed investor sentiment.

news.title:
NSE imposes an additional 15% margin on 18 stocks in March series to curb concentration risk.
Stocks include Vodafone Idea, RBL Bank, NBCC, Aditya Birla Capital, DLF, and others. ASM framework stocks also impacted.
news.summary:
NSE imposes an additional 15% margin on 18 stocks in March series to curb concentration risk.

news.title:
SC rules spectrum as a national asset, limiting telecom firms' monetisation.
Experts believe the ruling won't impact telecoms' bank funding prospects.
news.summary:
SC rules spectrum as a national asset, limiting telecom firms' monetisation.
